validation_summary.evidence: python -m py_compile <new files> exits 0 (0.14s); python -m unittest skills.development-harness.scripts.tests.test_dispatch_batch -v passes 9/9 (3.5s); python -m unittest discover skills/development-harness/scripts/tests passes 118/118 up from 109 (11.3s)

checkpoint.summary: unit_019 complete. New skills/development-harness/scripts/dispatch_batch.py (stdlib-only, 207 LOC incl. docstring) creates per-unit git worktrees via `git worktree add -b harness/<batch_id>/<unit_id> .harness/worktrees/<batch_id>/<unit_id> HEAD`, seeds <worktree>/.harness/WORKTREE_UNIT.json with batch_id/unit_id/phase_id/touches_paths, and writes state.execution.fleet with status='running' entries matching the v2 schema. Atomic teardown on any per-unit subprocess/OS/KeyError via _rollback(root, created) that best-effort removes every worktree + branch created so far, then re-raises as DispatchError. 9 new unit tests (TestHappyPath 5, TestAtomicRollback 2, TestCliSmoke 2) use tempdir + real `git init` fixtures. Test suite 109 -> 118.
checkpoint.next_action: Complete unit_020 (PHASE_005): new skills/development-harness/scripts/merge_batch.py -- serial fan-in via `git merge --no-ff`, abort_batch vs serialize_conflicted conflict strategies, post-merge repo-wide validation, `git reset --hard <pre-merge-ref>` rollback on failure, branch + worktree cleanup on success.
